title: Potion of Bees
body:
Potion of bees can be brewed at the brewing stand via an awkward potion and a honeycomb block, and can be further brewed with gunpowder to make Splash Potions of Bees, or with dragon's breath to make Lingering Potions of Bees. Throw Splash Potions of Bees at things to release a swarm of angry bees.

[This is a link to a youtube video of the potion of bees](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6mTHHnB63IU)
